area_anchor: Brikette — Draft regeneration guard has an off-by-one that lets duplicates through in the boundary second
current_truth: The 10-second recency guard in the regenerate route uses strict less-than (<) instead of less-than-or-equal (<=), allowing duplicate regenerations exactly at the 10-second boundary.
next_scope_now: Change < to <= in the recency guard comparison.
evidence_refs: operator-stated: off-by-one in regenerate idempotency guard
why: When staff click 'regenerate draft' exactly at the 10-second mark, a duplicate draft can slip through. Fixing the comparison operator closes this edge case.

intended_outcome.statement: The recency guard correctly blocks regeneration attempts at exactly the boundary time.
